title: Package with Poetry
description: Package with Poetry documents packaging material for Poetry in the language domain. It is classified as an entity page for the package class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Directory Structure, pyproject.toml, Extras, Scripts, and Build, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include python, package with poetry, packaging, and language, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / python / poetry / packaging, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
